title: ux-NumberField
text: ux-NumberField This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-NumberField properties. ux-NumberField widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-NumberField Maps to physical widget: uxnumberfield of type numeric Default definition: ux-NumberField=uxNumberField() Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Field for adding only numeric values Related Links uxnumberfield The uxnumberfield widget is a number field input control. It supports only numeric values. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
